description: Primitives available on the GW1NZ-1-QN48-C6/I5 device.

latches.source: DS841-1.8E, Table 2-1, Section 3.2 (CFU); UG288 Gowin CFU User Guide

FAB.note: CFU REG elements can be configured as D latches. GW1NZ-1 has 1152 LUTs and 864 REGs. Each CFU has 4 CLS with 2 LUTs and 2 REGs each (CLS3 has REG/SREG). See UG288 Gowin CFU User Guide for details.

IOB.note: Registers in I/O logic can be programmed as latches.

memory.description: Distributed memory from CFU slices (Shadow SRAM)

memory.source: DS841-1.8E, Table 2-1 (Block SRAM 72K), Section 3.6 (BSRAM), Table 3-7 (Memory Size Configuration)
memory.description: Block Static Random Access Memory (BSRAM). Each block is 18,432 bits (18 Kbits). Total of 4 blocks providing 72 Kbits of BSRAM.
memory.note: 4 blocks x 18,432 bits = 73,728 bits. Each block is 18,432 bits (16K data + 2K parity). Read-before-write mode typical 100MHz. GW1NZ-1 does NOT support Dual Port BSRAM (DS841 Table 3-7, Note [1]).

modes.name: Single Port
modes.description: Single port read/write at one clock edge

modes.name: Semi-Dual Port
modes.description: Write on Port A, read on Port B simultaneously

memory.note: 64K User Flash. 32-bit data width, 10,000 write cycles, 40MHz clock. Normal mode for LV C6/I5 speed grade.

clock_gen.source: DS841-1.8E, Section 3.12 (On Chip Oscillator), Table 3-15 (Oscillator Output Frequency Options)

REF_CLK.description: OSC has no external clock input

DIV.description: Oscillator divider. Base frequency is ~250MHz divided by DIV.

clock_gen.source: DS841-1.8E, Section 3.8.2 (PLL), Table 3-14 (PLL Ports Definition); UG286 Gowin Clock User Guide
clock_gen.description: Phase-Locked Loop block with one reference input, a single VCO, and four physically distinct clock outputs.

verilog-2005:
rPLL #(
    .DEVICE("GW1NZ-1"),          // Specify your device
    .FCLKIN(%%REF_CLK_mhz%%),       // Input frequency in MHz
    .IDIV_SEL(%%IDIV%%),           // IDIV: Input divider
    .FBDIV_SEL(%%FBDIV%%),         // FBDIV: Feedback divider
    .ODIV_SEL(%%ODIV%%),           // ODIV: Output divider
    .PSDA_SEL("%%PSDA_SEL%%"),
    .DUTYDA_SEL("1000"),
    .DYN_IDIV_SEL("FALSE"),
    .DYN_FBDIV_SEL("FALSE"),
    .DYN_ODIV_SEL("FALSE"),
    .DYN_DA_EN("FALSE"),
    .DYN_SDIV_SEL(%%CLKOUTD_DIV%%),
    .CLKOUT_FT_DIR(1'b1),
    .CLKOUTP_FT_DIR(1'b1),
    .CLKOUT_DLY_STEP(0),
    .CLKOUTP_DLY_STEP(0),
    .CLKFB_SEL("internal"),
    .CLKOUT_BYPASS("FALSE"),
    .CLKOUTP_BYPASS("FALSE"),
    .CLKOUTD_BYPASS("FALSE"),
    .CLKOUTD_SRC("CLKOUT"),
    .CLKOUTD3_SRC("CLKOUT")
) u_pll_%%instance_idx%% (
    .CLKOUT(%%BASE%%),   // Primary output
    .LOCK(%%LOCK%%),     // High when stable
    .CLKOUTP(%%PHASE%%), // Phase shifted output
    .CLKOUTD(%%DIV%%),   // Divided output
    .CLKOUTD3(%%DIV3%%), // Divided by 3 output
    .RESET(1'b0),        // Reset signal
    .RESET_P(1'b0),      // PLL power down
    .CLKIN(%%REF_CLK%%),  // Reference clock input
    .CLKFB(1'b0)         // External feedback
);
rtlil:
cell \rPLL $auto$%%instance_idx%%
  parameter \DEVICE "GW1NZ-1"
  parameter \FCLKIN %%REF_CLK_mhz%%
  parameter \IDIV_SEL %%IDIV%%
  parameter \FBDIV_SEL %%FBDIV%%
  parameter \ODIV_SEL %%ODIV%%
  parameter \PSDA_SEL "%%PSDA_SEL%%"
  parameter \DUTYDA_SEL "1000"
  parameter \DYN_IDIV_SEL "FALSE"
  parameter \DYN_FBDIV_SEL "FALSE"
  parameter \DYN_ODIV_SEL "FALSE"
  parameter \DYN_DA_EN "FALSE"
  parameter \DYN_SDIV_SEL %%CLKOUTD_DIV%%
  parameter \CLKOUT_FT_DIR 1
  parameter \CLKOUTP_FT_DIR 1
  parameter \CLKOUT_DLY_STEP 0
  parameter \CLKOUTP_DLY_STEP 0
  parameter \CLKFB_SEL "internal"
  parameter \CLKOUT_BYPASS "FALSE"
  parameter \CLKOUTP_BYPASS "FALSE"
  parameter \CLKOUTD_BYPASS "FALSE"
  parameter \CLKOUTD_SRC "CLKOUT"
  parameter \CLKOUTD3_SRC "CLKOUT"
  connect \CLKIN \%%REF_CLK%%
  connect \CLKOUT \%%BASE%%
  connect \LOCK \%%LOCK%%
  connect \CLKOUTP \%%PHASE%%
  connect \CLKOUTD \%%DIV%%
  connect \CLKOUTD3 \%%DIV3%%
  connect \RESET 1'0
  connect \RESET_P 1'0
  connect \CLKFB 1'0
end

REF_CLK.description: Reference clock input to the PLL

IDIV.description: Input clock divider select (actual divider = IDIV + 1)

PSDA_SEL.description: String representation of the binary number for PHASESEL ex: "0001", "1100".

frequency_mhz.description: Frequency of the base output clock derived directly from the FVCO.

PHASE.description: Primary output, Phase shifted. Requires PHASESEL

frequency_mhz.description: Frequency of the phased output clock. Identical to the base output frequency.

phase_deg.description: Phase offset applied to the phased output, expressed in degrees relative to the base output.

frequency_mhz.description: Frequency of the divided output clock after applying the post-divider.
Frequency of the fixed divide-by-3 output derived from the base output.

LOCK.description: PLL lock indicator, high when PLL is locked

constraints.description: The phased output may only be used if a valid PHASESEL value is provided.
The divided output may only be used if a valid CLKOUTD_DIV value is provided.

clock_gen.source: DS841-1.8E, Section 3.8 (Clock); UG286 Gowin Clock User Guide
clock_gen.description: Local clock divider (CLKDIV) for IO logic. Divides an input clock by a fixed ratio.

rtlil:
cell \CLKDIV $auto$%%instance_idx%%
  parameter \DIV_MODE "%%DIV_MODE%%"
  parameter \GSREN "false"
  connect \HCLKIN \%%REF_CLK%%
  connect \RESETN 1'1
  connect \CALIB 1'0
  connect \CLKOUT \%%BASE%%
end

REF_CLK.description: Reference clock input to the clock divider

frequency_mhz.description: Frequency of the divided output clock.

clock_gen.source: DS841-1.8E, Section 3.8.1 (Global Clock), Figure 3-17 (GCLK Quadrant Distribution); UG286 Gowin Clock User Guide
clock_gen.description: Global clock buffer (DQCE). Promotes a clock onto the global GCLK network with dynamic clock enable.

REF_CLK.description: Reference clock input to the buffer

CE.description: Clock enable (active-high). When deasserted, output is held low.

BASE.description: Buffered clock output on global network

frequency_mhz.description: Same frequency as input (buffer, no division).

clock_gen.source: DS841-1.8E, Section 3.8.3 (HCLK); UG286 Gowin Clock User Guide
clock_gen.description: HCLK clock buffer (DHCEN). Promotes a clock onto the regional HCLK network with dynamic clock enable (active-low CE).

REF_CLK.description: Reference clock input to the buffer

CE.description: Clock enable (active-low). When asserted low, output is enabled.

BASE.description: Buffered clock output on HCLK network

frequency_mhz.description: Same frequency as input (buffer, no division).

differential.source: DS841-1.8E, Section 3.3 (IOB). GW1NZ-1 supports differential OUTPUT only, not differential input.

wire width 1 \jz_not_%%reset%%_%%instance%%
cell $not $auto$not_%%instance%%
  parameter \A_SIGNED 0
  parameter \A_WIDTH 1
  parameter \Y_WIDTH 1
  connect \A \%%reset%%
  connect \Y \jz_not_%%reset%%_%%instance%%
end
cell \OSER4 $auto$%%instance%%
  parameter \GSREN "FALSE"
  parameter \LSREN "TRUE"
  parameter \HWL "false"
  parameter \TXCLK_POL 1'0
  connect \D0 \%%D0%%
  connect \D1 \%%D1%%
  connect \D2 \%%D2%%
  connect \D3 \%%D3%%
  connect \TX0 1'0
  connect \TX1 1'0
  connect \FCLK \%%fclk%%
  connect \PCLK \%%pclk%%
  connect \RESET \jz_not_%%reset%%_%%instance%%
  connect \Q0 \%%output%%
end
